subcodes.first_line: The letter which your honour addressed to Jinab-i-Nazir - upon him be the glory of God - reached the gaze of this Wronged One and We perused it [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نامه آنجناب که بجناب ناظر علیه بهائی ارسال نمودند بلحاظ مظلوم فائز دیدیم و
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @service to others; to the Cause of God
